prompt: /sketch 考虑把现在内存里的 session 缓存换成 Redis，这样水平扩展多实例时不会有状态同步问题

assertions.text: Original first entry (about token refresh) is still present in ideas.md
New Redis caching idea was appended — should contain 'Redis' and '水平扩展'
There are exactly 2 '##' section headings in ideas.md (two entries)
Both entries use consistent format with **Context**: line
Response to user is brief (under 30 words)
